event: Ecstasy of Saint Margaret of Cortona — mystical vision
symbols: kneeling figure in ecstasy — the mystical experience of divine encounter
heavenly figures descending — the vision of Christ and angels
small dog at her feet — Margaret's attribute, the dog that led her to her lover's murdered body
cross or staff — the instrument of penance and devotion
dramatic light from above — divine illumination breaking into earthly darkness
dark overall palette — the darkness of the world from which the saint is being drawn upward
description: A dark Baroque painting depicting a mystical scene. In the lower right, a woman in a white garment kneels with an upward gaze of rapture or ecstasy. Above and to the left, heavenly figures — angels and a central divine figure — descend in a burst of light through clouds and darkness. A small dark dog is visible at the lower left near the kneeling figure. A cross or staff appears in the scene. The overall palette is very dark with dramatic bursts of light on the celestial figures and the saint's white garment.

_meta.title: Ecstasy of St. Margaret of Cortona
